title: Marketplace Liquidity Monitor
summary: Measure supply-demand balance, time-to-match, and liquidity risk across marketplace segments.
knowledge_base: Marketplace Liquidity Monitor is positioned as a Marketplace starter that emphasizes fast iteration, clear documentation, and production-friendly interfaces.
The primary value proposition is: Measure supply-demand balance, time-to-match, and liquidity risk across marketplace segments.
Recommended operating model: ship a small API, add observability, validate outputs with stakeholder review, and monitor the top business KPI every week.
Typical stakeholders include analytics, operations, product, and leadership teams working on marketplace, ops, liquidity.
